# Base Transaction Resolver

An HTTP Server-Sent Events (SSE) Model Context Protocol gateway providing live, authentic block data directly from the Base execution ledger.

## Core Capabilities
- `resolve_transaction`: Accepts a unique transaction hash string, queries the underlying blockchain network, and extracts structured parameters including validation status, block height, and timestamp data.

## Integration Targets
- Service URL: https://agent-services-seven.vercel.app/
- Protocol Type: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Serverless Event Feed
- Operational Cost: Free Tier ($0/call)
